under the conditions of the experiments.

The total yield of each mass chain, obtained by

fractional independent yield and the total chain
No details on sources of uncertainties.
The equations of best fit for each mass chain are
given as P(Z)=A exp(-(Z-Zp)**2/c), where P(Z) is the
fractional independent yield of the radionuclide with
charge Z, A is the maximum value of the function, Zp
is the most probable charge (mean of distribution),
and c is the measure of the width of the distribution.
No details on sources of uncertainties.
